sentence: Tuffin first. Analvise later. Never mix the order.

wombos.definition: The twin version of being tough — mutual toughness shared between two people with a twin-coded bond.
wombos.example: Those two are out here tuffin together like nothing can touch them.

wombos.definition: The verb form of analvision — to analyze and revise something on the spot. Used when someone needs to rethink their approach in real time: 'You need to analvise yourself.'
